title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] Add local-first AI food diary feature with CLI, rule-based parser, and SQLite persistence
summary:
Implements an end-to-end "enter food diary" workflow designed to run locally on a Raspberry Pi 4 — typed input → rule-based NLP parse → structured SQLite storage → review/edit/confirm loop → CSV export. All parsing is offline-first with optional Ollama and Whisper STT extension points.
